Frequently Asked Questions

Is it really free?
Yes. The free plan gives you full access to the inspector, color/font/layout analysis, and a generous monthly quota of downloads and code exports. No credit card required.
How does the AI export work?
DesignGrab captures the full design context of a pinned element — HTML, CSS, colors, fonts, layout structure — and sends it to Claude (Anthropic's AI) to generate a production-ready React TSX, Vue SFC, or Figma-compatible SVG component.
Is my data private?
Absolutely. DesignGrab runs entirely in your browser. Your design data, saved library, and API keys are stored locally in Chrome storage. Nothing is sent to our servers.
Can I cancel anytime?
Our Pro plan is billed monthly and you can cancel your subscription at any time with one click. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing cycle.

Ready to start?

Install the Chrome extension to start using DesignGrab for free.

Install Chrome Extension

Free to use. No credit card required.
